# Modal

## When to use

- Project serves custom AI models on Modal (inference endpoints, scheduled batch, GPU workers).

## When NOT to use

- Project uses Replicate / managed hosted endpoints — see `model-serving-replicate.md`.
- Project only calls hosted LLM APIs — no serving needed.
